error: ENOSPC: no space left on device
solution: Disk is full. Free space by clearing caches or old files.
command: df -h && sudo apt clean && docker system prune -f

solution: PostgreSQL is not running. Start the service.

error: npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
solution: Dependency conflict in node_modules. Force install with legacy peer deps.
Docker build has no network or DNS during the RUN step, so ssh-keyscan fails. Use build network or pre-add known_hosts.
command: In Dockerfile: use --network=host for the build, or COPY a pre-scanned known_hosts file.
